title: Nania colensoi
taxonomy: Nania colensoi is a flowering plant belonging to the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the ice plant family. It is native to New Zealand and is a small succulent plant. The plant is typically classified as Nania colensoi, with some sources placing it within the genus Ruschia. However, further research is necessary to confirm the plant's classification with certainty. Nania colensoi is also sometimes considered a synonym of Ruschia colensoi.
uses: Nania colensoi is a plant native to New Zealand and has been used in traditional Maori medicine for various purposes. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as to reduce inflammation.
